Layout.tagline: Lure notes from anglers, for anglers
Layout.brandPromise: We bring together what is written on the box and what happens on the water.
Layout.footerTagline: We bring together what is written on the box and what happens on the water.

meta.title: TrollMatch — Lure guide for the Aegean & Eastern Mediterranean
meta.description: What the box says and what anglers report from the water — lures, species, and notes for Turkey, Cyprus, and the Eastern Mediterranean.

hero.title: What's on the box.
hero.description: We bring together what is written on the box and what happens on the water. Starting with the fish and methods common around Turkey and Cyprus.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search by model, brand, or species…

species.title: Commonly fished here
species.description: Lüfer, levrek, palamut, and çipura — species people target most in these waters. We list which lures have been tried and reported.

collections.title: Grouped by how people fish here
collections.description: Bosphorus runs, Aegean shore casting, and Mediterranean trolling — lures people use for each.

manufacturers.title: Brands we follow
manufacturers.description: Hard-bait makers whose box specs and listings we keep on file — plus a few still being added.

latest.title: Recently added
latest.description: New models from manufacturer pages we've updated.

statistics.title: By the numbers
statistics.description: What's in the guide right now — no more, no less.

lureSection.title: Real catch reports
lureSection.description: What anglers actually caught with this lure — verified before publication.

form.title: Report your catch
form.notesPlaceholder: e.g. dawn, rocky point, fast retrieve

trust.title: Why trust this?
trust.description: Provenance, evidence, community consensus, and editorial verification — in one place.

sections.specificationsDescription: Length, weight, dive depth, and the rest — as the manufacturer lists them.
sections.speciesDescription: What the box suggests, what anglers aim for, and what people have reported.
sections.techniquesDescription: Methods that match this lure's shape and action — from specs and field notes.
sections.trollingDescription: Speed, leader, and line — as the manufacturer suggests.
sections.communityDescription: What anglers have reported back — where, when, and how it went for them.
sections.aiInsightsDescription: A short read pulling together box specs and reported field notes, with sources linked.
sections.relatedDescription: Other models worth comparing side by side.
sections.sponsoredDescription: Shop links if you want them — only when you ask.
sections.historyDescription: Updates to this lure's box specs or field notes over time.

community.source: From angler reports — not what's printed on the box.

sponsored.disclaimer: Shop links don't change how lures are listed. Retailers only show when you choose to look.

AddLure.title: Add a lure
AddLure.description: Know a lure worth listing? Add the box details and anything you've seen on the water. Saving isn't available yet — preview only for now.

fields.imageHint: Preview only — uploads aren't available yet.

preview.title: Preview
preview.emptyDescription: Your lure card will show up here as you fill in the form.
